get.description: Retrieves a list of all scheduled jobs.
Retrieves details for a specific job.
Retrieves execution history for a specific job with optional filters.

delete.description: Purges job run history older than a specified date.

get.description: Retrieves aggregated statistics for a job’s execution history.
Retrieves all triggers associated with a specific job.

post.description: Triggers a job to run immediately with optional data.
Pauses the execution of a specific job.
Resumes the execution of a paused job.
Interrupts the execution of a currently running job.

get.description: Retrieves the registered file storage providers and their exposed location metadata.
Retrieves information about the configured file storage provider.
Runs the configured provider health check.
Checks whether the specified file path exists in the configured provider.
Streams the file content for the specified provider-backed path.

put.description: Writes the raw request body to the specified provider-backed file path.

delete.description: Deletes the specified provider-backed file path.

get.description: Lists files from the configured provider with optional recursion and continuation support.
Retrieves metadata for the specified provider-backed file path.
Computes a checksum for the specified provider-backed file path.
Checks whether the specified provider-backed directory path exists.
Lists directories from the configured provider with optional recursion.

post.description: Creates the specified provider-backed directory path.

delete.description: Deletes the specified provider-backed directory path.

get.description: Lists stored monitoring events for the provider-backed location, optionally filtered by path, event type, date range, and result size.

post.description: Triggers an on-demand file monitoring scan for the provider-backed location and returns the detected events.

get.description: Gets a single TodoItem by its unique identifier.

put.description: Updates an existing TodoItem with the specified details.

get.description: Gets all items matching the specified filter criteria.

post.description: Creates a new TodoItem with the specified details.
Searches for items matching the specified filter criteria.
Marks all TodoItems as completed.

get.description: Lists the attachments stored for the specified TodoItem.

post.description: Uploads or replaces an attachment for the specified TodoItem.

get.description: Downloads the specified TodoItem attachment.
Exports TodoItems in the specified format (excel, csv, json, xml, pdf).
Exports TodoItems grouped by status in separate Excel sheets.

post.description: Imports TodoItems from the specified format (excel, csv, json, xml).
Validates an import file without actually importing the data.

get.description: Retrieves aggregated statistics for persisted broker messages.
Retrieves persisted broker messages with optional operational filters.

delete.description: Purges persisted broker messages by age and optional status filters.

get.description: Retrieves a single persisted broker message including optional handler details.
Retrieves the stored serialized payload for a persisted broker message.

post.description: Resets a persisted broker message so retryable handler work can be processed again.
Resets a single persisted handler entry so it can be processed again.
Archives a terminal persisted broker message.

get.description: Retrieves aggregated statistics for retained queue messages.
Retrieves retained queue messages with optional operational filters.

delete.description: Purges retained queue messages by age and optional status filters.

get.description: Retrieves a single retained queue message.
Retrieves the stored serialized payload for a retained queue message.

post.description: Resets a retained queue message so it can be processed again.
Archives a terminal retained queue message.

get.description: Retrieves messages that are currently waiting for a compatible handler registration.
Retrieves aggregated queue broker state, including runtime capabilities and pause status.
Retrieves the currently active queue message type to handler registrations.

post.description: Pauses queue processing for the specified logical queue name.
Resumes queue processing for the specified logical queue name.
Pauses queue processing for the specified queue message type token.
Resumes queue processing for the specified queue message type token.

post.summary: Reset a queue message type circuit
post.description: Resets the operational circuit state for the specified queue message type token.

CompositeSpecification.description: A tree structure containing specification nodes for complex filtering logic

operator.description: The operator to use for filtering

value.description: The value to compare against (any type)

logic.description: Logic operator for combining nested lofty filters

FilterCriteria.description: Represents a single filter criterion for filtering query results

pageSize.description: The number of items per page

noTracking.description: Disable change tracking for improved query performance

orderings.description: Sort criteria to apply to the results

operator.description: The operator to use for filtering

value.description: The value to compare against (any type)

logic.description: Logic operator for combining nested lofty filters

items.description: Represents a single filter criterion for filtering query results

filters.description: Filter criteria to apply to the query

includes.description: Related entities to include via eager loading

hierarchyMaxDepth.description: Maximum depth for hierarchical data loading

FilterModel.description: Represents a complete filter model for querying data with pagination, sorting, and filtering

ProblemError.description: Represents an individual error entry with flexible structure for additional data

errors.description: Collection of additional errors outside the result object

ResultProblemData.description: Data section included within a problem details response

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem

ResultProblemDetails.description: A Problem Details response containing result information and contextual data (RFC 7807)

ResultProblemError.description: Represents an individual error entry with a message and optional metadata

isSuccess.description: Indicates whether the operation completed successfully

messages.description: Collection of informational or diagnostic messages from the operation

errors.description: Collection of domain or technical errors encountered during the operation

ResultProblemResult.description: Represents the operation outcome with success status, messages, and errors

SpecificationNode.description: Polymorphic specification node: either a leaf (named specification) or group (combining multiple nodes)

Bearer.description: The JWT token in the format: Bearer {token}
